name: EuiEmptyPrompt
description: Placeholder for empty states, error pages, and onboarding flows.

color.description:
Background color of the panel;
Usually a lightened form of the brand colors

hasBorder.description:
Adds a slight 1px border on all edges.
Only works when `color="plain | transparent"`

hasShadow.description:
Adds a medium shadow to the panel;
Only works when `color="plain"`

iconColor.description: Color for `iconType` when passed as an `IconType`

icon.description: Custom icon replacing the one generated by `iconType`

title.description:
Requires passing a single element that gets wrapped in an EuiTitle.
Recommendation is a heading, preferrably an `<h2>` if in its own section

titleSize.description: Choose from one of the `EuiTitle.size` options

body.description:
Gets wrapped in a subdued EuiText block. Recommendation is to pass typical text elements like `

`

actions.description:
Pass a single or an array of actions (buttons) that get stacked at the bottom.
Recommendation is to pass the primary action first and secondary actions as empty buttons

footer.description: Optionally provide a footer. Accepts any combination of elements.

layout.description: Sets the layout. When `horizontal` the icon goes to the right column.

paddingSize.description: Padding applied around the content and footer.

example: <EuiEmptyPrompt titleSize="m" paddingSize="l" color="plain" layout="vertical" iconType="logoSecurity" body="Add a new case or change your filter settings." />
